project.name: Dunn Residence
project.current_gate: Authorization, start payment, controlling inputs, and licensed runtime
project.priority: Client-authorized three-sheet production after all kickoff gates

overlap_statement: Five native-coordinate scan pairs were analyzed: four showed weak native overlap and one showed no material overlap. No transform was applied, no registration tolerance was adopted, and no pair was declared registered.
source_integrity_statement: The fresh metadata inventory matches the prior 908-file path-and-size set, and all five source/working validation pairs passed. Confidential source material remains private and read-only.
truth_boundary: No pair was declared registered and no survey accuracy is claimed.
No architectural, engineering, code, zoning, permit, or life-safety certification is claimed.
Native drawing production has not begun; no final production drawing or PDF exists.
Licensed native openability, dependencies, title-block behavior, and plot fidelity remain unvalidated.
client_actions: Provide or start licensed runtime access

milestones.name: Discovery and scope alignment
milestones.evidence: The three-sheet client scope, commercial terms, technical boundaries, and kickoff gates are documented.
milestones.limitation: Written authorization remains a separate kickoff gate.

milestones.name: Source package inventory
milestones.evidence: 908 files and 8,801,309,883 bytes were reconciled in the protected source inventory.
milestones.limitation: Aggregate client-safe counts only; confidential sources remain private.

milestones.name: Five source / working validations
milestones.evidence: 5 of 5 passed independent integrity, header, stride, endpoint, bounds, dimension, and manifest checks.
milestones.limitation: Not registration or survey certification.

milestones.name: Bounded full-source statistics
milestones.evidence: 91,688,946 source points were processed in bounded chunks and reconciled.
milestones.limitation: Analytical evidence only.

milestones.name: Full-source visual index
milestones.evidence: 25 full-source figures are published in the client-safe visual inspection gallery.
milestones.limitation: Analytical controls, not issued drawings.

milestones.name: Plan-control slice audit
milestones.evidence: Nine trial slice figures are published with contributing-point counts.
milestones.limitation: Two upper bands contain zero contributing points; candidate floor and units remain controls.

milestones.name: Native-coordinate pair audit
milestones.evidence: Five pairs were analyzed: four weak native overlaps and one no-material-overlap.
milestones.limitation: No transform, adopted tolerance, or registration pass.

milestones.name: Client-safe report library
milestones.evidence: Detailed intake, visual, header, slice, overlap, and completion reports are available from the OS.
milestones.limitation: Reports document analytical evidence and boundaries; they are not professional certifications.

milestones.name: Estimate and release package
milestones.evidence: The $3,200 estimate, print-optimized SOW, and client-safe evidence package passed local QA.
milestones.limitation: Requires human review and written authorization.

milestones.name: Written authorization
milestones.evidence: BDPC written authorization of the fixed-fee scope and included review round is required.
milestones.limitation: Production clock has not started.

milestones.name: $1,600 start payment
milestones.evidence: The start payment arrangement is required before production begins.
milestones.limitation: Production clock has not started.

milestones.name: Controlling project inputs
milestones.evidence: BDPC must confirm controlling CAD, design/redline intent, title block, standards, and dependencies.
milestones.limitation: Candidate status does not establish authority.

milestones.name: Licensed compatible runtime
milestones.evidence: A licensed compatible Autodesk runtime or approved remote workstation is required.
milestones.limitation: Native compatibility and plotting fidelity remain unvalidated.

milestones.name: Controlled CAD working set
milestones.evidence: Create protected working copies and validate native openability and dependencies after all kickoff gates.
milestones.limitation: Confidential originals remain immutable.

milestones.name: Existing floor plan
milestones.evidence: Draft and dimension the confirmed existing-condition basis.
milestones.limitation: No native production drawing exists yet.

milestones.name: Proposed floor plan
milestones.evidence: Coordinate the proposal to BDPC-confirmed design direction.
milestones.limitation: No native production drawing exists yet.

milestones.name: Site and area plan
milestones.evidence: Document the agreed footprint, work limits, and area context.
milestones.limitation: Must not imply survey, civil, or field-verification services.

milestones.name: Internal drawing and plot QA
milestones.evidence: Run geometry, annotation, layer, dependency, viewport, page-setup, and plotting checks.

milestones.name: BDPC check set and consolidated review
milestones.evidence: Issue the coordinated review PDF and resolve one consolidated BDPC review round.
milestones.limitation: Check-set target is three business days after all kickoff gates; client review time is excluded.

milestones.name: Final issue and closeout
milestones.evidence: After QA and review, issue the approved native CAD/PDF package and closeout record.
milestones.limitation: No final production drawing or PDF exists yet.

file_groups.notes: Aggregate count only; confidential source imagery remains private. Only reviewed client-safe derivatives appear in reports.
Raw scanner working files remain private, read-only, and unpublished.

file_groups.group: Text, CSV, and JSON support files
file_groups.notes: Private metadata and analytical inputs remain outside the public OS.
Five source/working pairs passed independent validation; no point-cloud source is published.
Candidate current and standards-reference roles are documented; BDPC must confirm controlling authority and licensed openability remains unvalidated.
Candidate conceptual and standards-reference roles are documented; BDPC must confirm controlling authority.

standards.rule: No finer than 1/2 inch unless BDPC directs otherwise.
Start typical 2×4 framed partitions at 3.5 inches, then reconcile field evidence.
Reuse established BDPC or controlling current-project blocks and known sizes before creating new content.
Use only the Dunn CAD and design inputs that BDPC confirms as controlling, reconciled with reviewed scan evidence; reference files provide standards context only.
Use the current BDPC presentation standard after BDPC confirms the controlling title block and any separately maintained dependency.
No separately maintained CTB or STB is treated as controlling. Provide it if the confirmed drawing set depends on one.
No separately maintained font or shape-file package is treated as controlling. Provide required dependencies with the confirmed set.
Preserve and review native coordinates before any transformation; validate discrete common features in a licensed compatible runtime before production reliance.
Maintain unambiguous condition hierarchy, lineweight, and annotation separation.
Do not invent concealed conditions. Flag material conflicts and return design decisions to BDPC.
Do not imply survey, civil, or field-verification services; identify the basis and limitations of every site or area representation.

automation.result: 908 files and 8,801,309,883 bytes reconciled without modifying confidential sources.

Generate at final issue from actual approved changes.
Excluded unless separately authorized; human CAD review controls issued drawings.
